mapper.sql: dr.id, dr.title, dr.content, dr.media_url, dr.media_type, dr.compressed_media_url, dr.original_size_bytes, dr.compressed_size_bytes, dr.compression_status, dr.aigc_animation_url, dr.aigc_status, dr.heat_score, dr.like_count, dr.favorite_count, dr.comment_count, dr.share_count, dr.is_public, dr.share_token, dr.published_at, dr.score, dr.views, dr.destination_id, d.id AS destination_ref_id, d.name AS destination_name, d.scene_type AS destination_scene_type, d.category AS destination_category, d.heat AS destination_heat, d.rating AS destination_rating, d.description AS destination_description, d.latitude AS destination_latitude, d.longitude AS destination_longitude
mapper.select: SELECT FROM diary dr LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = dr.destination_id ORDER BY dr.published_at DESC, dr.id DESC
SELECT FROM diary dr LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = dr.destination_id WHERE dr.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM diary dr LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = dr.destination_id WHERE LOWER(dr.title) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{title}) || '%' ORDER BY dr.published_at DESC, dr.id DESC

SELECT FROM diary dr LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = dr.destination_id WHERE LOWER(dr.title) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(dr.content) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' ORDER BY dr.published_at DESC, dr.id DESC
SELECT FROM diary dr LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = dr.destination_id WHERE dr.is_public = 1 ORDER BY dr.heat_score DESC, dr.views DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM diary dr LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = dr.destination_id WHERE dr.share_token = #{shareToken}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary(title, content, media_type, media_url, compressed_media_url, original_size_bytes, compressed_size_bytes, compression_status, aigc_animation_url, aigc_status, heat_score, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, share_count, is_public, share_token, published_at, score, views, destination_id) VALUES(#{title}, #{content}, #{mediaType}, #{mediaUrl}, #{compressedMediaUrl}, #{originalSizeBytes}, #{compressedSizeBytes}, #{compressionStatus}, #{aigcAnimationUrl}, #{aigcStatus}, #{heatScore}, #{likeCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{commentCount}, #{shareCount}, #{isPublic}, #{shareToken}, #{publishedAt}, #{score}, #{views}, #{destination.id})
mapper.update: UPDATE diary SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, media_type = #{mediaType}, media_url = #{mediaUrl}, compressed_media_url = #{compressedMediaUrl}, original_size_bytes = #{originalSizeBytes}, compressed_size_bytes = #{compressedSizeBytes}, compression_status = #{compressionStatus}, aigc_animation_url = #{aigcAnimationUrl}, aigc_status = #{aigcStatus}, heat_score = #{heatScore}, like_count = #{likeCount}, favorite_count = #{favoriteCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, share_count = #{shareCount}, is_public = #{isPublic}, share_token = #{shareToken}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, score = #{score}, views = #{views}, destination_id = #{destination.id} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE diary SET views = #{views}, like_count = #{likeCount}, favorite_count = #{favoriteCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, share_count = #{shareCount}, heat_score = #{heatScore} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary_comment(diary_id, author_name, content, created_at) VALUES(#{diaryId}, #{authorName}, #{content}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, diary_id AS diaryId, author_name AS authorName, content, created_at AS createdAt FROM diary_comment WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
